description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The documents herein contain the Data Repository for the Primitive Hub Document.
summary: Clarify Prime Agent Data Production Responsibilities
description: Clarifies that Prime Agents are responsible for data production and Risk Capital inputs.

As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.
